features: Wonder Wave Lips & Face Hydrating Travel Set - Includes Power Wave Super Hydrating Moisturizer and Tell All Juicy Secret Berry Lip Balm, paired to bring targeted hydration and barrier repair to dry skin and lips.

Power Wave Super Hydrating Moisturizer - This peptide-rich face cream comforts dry, unhappy skin with silky hydration powered by jojoba oil, Aquaxyl, and Hexapeptide-9 to support a healthy skin barrier.

Tell All Juicy Secret - A non-sticky, hydrating lip balm that nourishes dry lips with moringa oil esters and chicory root extract for smooth, plumped lips—plus a sweet berry flavor and matching keychain.

The Perfect Duo for Face & Lips - Layer the Power Wave Moisturizer morning and night after serums, then swipe on Tell All Lip Balm anytime for an instant hit of hydration and softness that travels with you.

Gentle Formulas, Fierce Results - Our skincare products are not meant to work instantly. Instead, our gentle formulas are specifically designed to provide consistent, long-lasting results, because slow and steady wins the face.
description: Product description Get saved by the wave with this hydrating skincare travel kit designed for face and lips. The Power Wave Super Hydrating Moisturizer delivers a comforting surge of hydration for dry, sensitive skin with nourishing ingredients like jojoba oil, Aquaxyl, and peptide-rich Hexapeptide-9 to support barrier health and long-lasting moisture. Tell All Juicy Secret Berry Lip Balm hydrates and smooths dry, chapped lips with a soft, plush texture. Powered by moringa oil esters and chicory root extract, it plumps and conditions with a non-sticky, berry-flavored finish. Together, this lip and skincare set helps restore hydration and comfort to dry skin from lips to face. Ingredients See product for full ingredients list Directions Power Wave Super Hydrating Moisturizer: Evenly apply to clean skin. Use morning and evening. Use this after any of your serums or toners, but before sunscreen. Tell All Juicy Secret Berry Lip Balm: Apply evenly to lips for instant moisture. Safety Warning For external use only. See more
